title: Velvet Christmas Ribbon Wired with Silk Backing Double Sided Red Gold Green Ribbon Set of 3 63mm X 10 Yards per Spool
features: Art Beauty multi-purpose plush velvet ribbon with shiny silk backing will add a unique touch to your project.
Wired velvet ribbon allows you to bend and shape easily.
Classic Christmas Colour Themed Combination. Red Green Gold Velvet ribbon for more Christmas cheer.
Elegant and luxurious looking for all seasons. The ribbon will make a gift look special for any occasions.
Set of 3. Each Christmas Ribbon size: 6.3cm X 10 Yards.
